title: Export Pages Request Schema
description: Schema for requesting a portable export bundle of one or more pages (issue #30, Phase 5)

pageIds.description: Ids of the pages to include in the export bundle

options.description: Optional export switches. The page structure (including portable @section: data links) is always exported; these only control whether owned data tables / rows are bundled too.

includeDataTables.description: When true, also export the column definitions of each in-bundle form-owned data table so the importer can pre-create an (empty) table. Default false.

includeDataRows.description: When true, also export each owned table's rows (keyed by human field name) as sample data. Implies includeDataTables. Default false.
